name: How much is my slip and fall at work worth in Boise Idaho?
description: Medical + 3x wages typically; consult lawyer for case value.

mainEntity.name: How much is my slip and fall at work worth in Boise Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical + 3x wages typically; consult lawyer for case value.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Value based on medical bills, lost wages, future care; average $20K-$100K+ depending on injury severity.** Workers' comp caps non-economic damages.[1][5] Key factors: Back fractures worth more than sprains. Permanent disability boosts. Calculate 3x medical + wages. Multipliers vary. Attorney negotiates higher settlements.
